title: BNMU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: BNMU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Bhupendra Narayan Mandal University Result 2026 Out for UG 1st Semester and PG 1st & 3rd Semester December 2025 exams on the official website - bnmu.ac.in on 02 May 2026 and 10 February 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the BNMU result.

content.text: Bhupendra Narayan Mandal University (BNMU) has officially released the BNMU Result 2026 for various UG and PG semester examinations conducted in December 2025, including BA, BSc, BCom 1st Semester and multiple MA, MSc, MCom semesters. The latest updates reflect the publication of B.Sc and B.A 1st Semester results on 02 May 2026 along with several PG 1st and 3rd Semester results in different subjects like Botany, Chemistry, Economics, History, and more. BNMU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - bnmu.ac.in.

Students can check and download their BNMU UG and PG results by visiting the university portal, selecting the relevant semester result link, and entering their examination roll number or other login details as required.

After downloading the online marksheet, students are advised to carefully verify their name, roll number, subject-wise marks, and overall status, and contact the university or their college immediately in case of any discrepancy.
Bhupendra Narayan Mandal University has released BNMU Result 2026 for UG 1st Semester and PG 1st & 3rd Semester December 2025 exams on its official websites bnmu.ac.in and bnmuumis.in.

Students of BA, BSc, BCom, MA, MSc, MCom and other PG courses can check their latest semester results by opening the result portal, selecting the relevant notification, and downloading the marksheet PDF.

Bhupendra Narayan Mandal University has enabled direct links to check BNMU Result 2026 for UG 1st Semester and PG 1st & 3rd Semester December 2025 examinations on its official UMIS portal bnmuumis.in.
Students can open the respective result notification, click on the download option, and view or save their marksheet PDF using the official links provided below.

links.label: BNMU UG 1st Semester Result 2026 - BA, BSc, BCom (Semester I, December 2025)

sections.heading: How to Check BNMU Result 2026 Online

items: Visit the official website of Bhupendra Narayan Mandal University at bnmu.ac.in or directly open the UMIS result portal at bnmuumis.in.
On the homepage, look for the 'Result & Notification' or 'General Instruction and Notification' section and click on it to view the latest BNMU Result 2026 updates.

Under the list of notifications, find the relevant result link such as 'B.A Semester - I Examination December 2025', 'B.Sc Semester - I Examination December 2025', 'B.Com Semester - I', or respective PG semester results.
Click on the corresponding 'Download' or 'View Result' option to open the result PDF in a new window/tab.
Check your name, roll number, subject-wise marks, and overall result status in the PDF marksheet.
Download the BNMU marksheet PDF to your device and take a printout for future reference and admission or document verification.

structured_links.label: BNMU UG 1st Semester Result 2026 - BA, BSc, BCom (Semester I, December 2025)
